reason: The evaluation quantifies the compute floor for the Llama7B 131k native-GQA KV8 planning model, but the winning throughput points are still analytic proxies rather than concrete clustered RTL/PPA implementations.
next_action: Evaluate concrete clustered compute structures near the 131072 to 524288 MAC/cycle boundary, then sweep NoC bandwidth/hops and SRAM/HBM balance using those measured points.
